ogTitle: Drouin South vs Drumanure: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Drouin South and Drumanure.
heading: Drouin South vs Drumanure — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Drouin South, Victoria and Drumanure, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Drumanure has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Drouin South (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Drouin South or Drumanure safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Drouin South has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Drumanure scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Drouin South scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Drumanure scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Drouin South or Drumanure?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Drumanure has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
